titles.title: Within the veil, I now would come – v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Within the veil, I now would come Into the holy place, to lock upon Your face I see such beauty there, None other can compare I worship You, Oh Lord, Within the veil.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Within the veil, there was a time, My heart didn't know His way I did not seek thy face Thy nature was to me A hidden mystery, Until I called thy depths, Within the veil.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With in the veil My heart thirst to obey; Thy nature shall be mine O grant it Lord, I pray Thy will be done on earth Bring us to keep thy Word And take us deeper still, Within the veil.
